sentences.arabic: بَدَأَ صَدِيقِي مَشْرُوعًا صَغِيرًا لِبَيْعِ الْمُنْتَجَاتِ الْيَدَوِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Moj prijatelj je započeo mali biznis za prodaju ručnih radova.
sentences.translationEn: My friend started a small business selling handmade products.

sentences.arabic: هُوَ يَعْمَلُ بِاجْتِهَادٍ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ لِتَطْوِيرِ مَشْرُوعِهِ الْجَدِيدِ.
sentences.translation: On naporno radi svaki dan kako bi razvio svoj novi projekat.
sentences.translationEn: He works hard every day to develop his new project.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ وَسَائِلَ التَّوَاصُلِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ لِلْوُصُولِ إِلَى زَبَائِنَ أَكْثَرَ.
sentences.translation: Koristi društvene mreže kako bi došao do više kupaca.
sentences.translationEn: He uses social media to reach more customers.
